text.title: Continuous Discovery Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply the Continuous Discovery methodology end-to-end. Each step lists input, action, output, and an optional decision gate.

step.name: daily-collect
step.action: Haiku watchers append to insight-log.md and ticket-themes.md (atomic append + lock).

step.name: weekly-interview
step.action: Conduct 2-3 interviews; pipe transcripts to interview-synthesizer (sonnet) with interviewer-turn stripping.

step.name: weekly-assumption-test
step.action: assumption-tester (sonnet) designs smoke/fake-door/prototype/Mom-Test test; runs; records result rubric.
step.decision-gate: Reject 'ship and measure' as a test type.

step.name: bi-weekly-synth
step.action: discovery-synthesizer (opus) updates OST; scores opportunities freq x sev x addressability.
step.decision-gate: Refuse to publish a 'finding' that fails N>=5 / 2-source floor.

step.name: monthly-review
step.action: research-reviewer (opus) writes strategic memo + kill list + doubled-down list.
step.decision-gate: Kill list mandatory; refuse if empty after >=4 weeks.
